hero.heading: Share Knowledge, Grow Skills
hero.subheading: SkillUp is a peer-to-peer learning platform where students teach and learn from each other. Earn SkillCoin by teaching, spend it by learning.

howItWorks.heading: Start in 3 Simple Steps
howItWorks.subheading: The platform is easy to use — sign up, find a skill, and start learning today.

step1.title: Browse
step1.description: Explore hundreds of skills offered by fellow students: coding, languages, music, and more.

step2.title: Book
step2.description: Pick a time that suits you and schedule an in-person session with a tutor.

step3.title: Learn
step3.description: Meet in person, spend SkillCoin to learn. Teach your own skills to earn more.

skillcoin.heading: Knowledge Is the New Currency
skillcoin.subheading: SkillCoin is the platform's internal currency. Earn by teaching, spend by learning.
skillcoin.earnDesc: List your skill and start teaching — receive SkillCoin for every session you complete.
skillcoin.spendDesc: Take lessons from any tutor — SkillCoin is automatically deducted from your balance.

browse.title: Browse Services
browse.noResultsHint: Try a different keyword or select another category.

wallet.title: Wallet
wallet.escrowNote: Released automatically when your active orders complete
wallet.demoTopupBody: On the real platform you would top up via Click or Payme here.
wallet.demoWithdrawBody: On the real platform you would withdraw SkillCoin to your bank account or Click wallet here.

tutor.heading: Share Your Knowledge, Earn SkillCoin
tutor.subheading: 200+ students are looking for someone with your skills. Teach on your schedule, get paid securely through escrow.
tutor.demoModalBody: On the real platform you would sign up and add your first service listing right here.
tutor.how1Desc: Add your subject, price, and availability — takes under 10 minutes.
tutor.how2Desc: The platform surfaces your profile. You get notified as soon as a student books.
tutor.how3Desc: Meet your student on campus or a nearby spot and run the session.
tutor.how4Desc: Payment is released automatically after the session. 10% platform fee is deducted — the rest is yours.
tutor.benefit1Desc: You set the times. If your exam schedule shifts, cancelling is instant.
tutor.benefit2Desc: Student funds are held in escrow until the session is confirmed complete. No session — no payout.
tutor.benefit3Desc: 1 SkillCoin = 1,000 UZS. Withdraw your earnings to a bank account or Click wallet anytime.
tutor.benefit4Desc: Join 200+ active student tutors and build a reputation that follows you after graduation.
tutor.storiesSub: Real students share their experience teaching on SkillUp
tutor.faq1Q: What do I need to become a tutor?
tutor.faq1A: You just need to be enrolled at a university in Uzbekistan and have knowledge in at least one subject. No certificates required.
tutor.faq2A: The platform takes a 10% fee on each completed session. The remaining 90% goes directly to you.
tutor.faq3Q: When do I receive my money?
tutor.faq3A: Escrow is released automatically after the session ends and SkillCoin appears in your wallet. You can then withdraw via Click or bank transfer.
tutor.faq4A: Yes, as many as you like. For example, English conversation and IELTS exam prep can each be separate listings.
tutor.faq5Q: What happens if a student cancels?
tutor.faq5A: Cancellations more than 24 hours before the session receive a full refund. Within 24 hours, no refund is issued.
tutor.ctaSub: Turn your expertise into income — your next student is already looking.

service.demoModalBody: This is a demo — on the real platform you would select a time slot and confirm your booking with the tutor here.
service.escrowNotice: Funds held in escrow until all sessions are complete
